title: Feeling green: Cynthia Erivo down 25 percent in Best Actress Oscar odds — but all is not lost
text: Cynthia Erivo Oscar Predictions Analysis. Following the Golden Globes, Cynthia Erivo's Oscar prospects became less certain. The star of 'Wicked: For Good' is down 25 percentage points in Gold Derby's Best Actress Oscar predictions. After appearing in the Top 5 lineup for the entire awards season, Erivo is now in seventh place for a nomination. She now has just a 38% chance of receiving an Oscar nomination. Historical Context: Erivo was nominated for a Golden Globe for Best Performance by a Female Actor in a Motion Picture — Musical or Comedy at the 2026 Golden Globes. She made history as the first Black actress with two nominations in that Musical or Comedy category, having also been nominated for Wicked last year. Golden Globes Performance: At the 2026 Globes, Cynthia Erivo did not win the Best Actress (Musical or Comedy) award, which went to Rose Byrne. However, 'Wicked: For Good' won significant recognition in other categories. Losing the support of the film critics was a major blow, especially considering she received a nomination from the group last year for the first 'Wicked.' However, just days after Erivo was blanked at the Critics Choice Awards, she rebounded at the Golden Globes with a nomination for Best Film Comedy/Musical Actress.
